id.description: The unique identifier for the DMS replication subnet group.

replication_subnet_group_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the DMS replication subnet group.

replication_subnet_group_description.description: A description of the DMS replication subnet group.

subnet_group_status.description: The current status of the DMS replication subnet group.

subnet_ids.description: The set of subnet IDs associated with the DMS replication subnet group.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the DMS replication subnet group.

vpc_id.description: The VPC ID where the DMS replication subnet group is located.
